Name: Avoid division (use DIVIDE function instead)
Description: Calculated Columns, Measures or Calculated Tables should not use the division symbol in their expressions (/) unless the denominator is a constant value. Instead, it is advised to always use the DIVIDE(<numerator>,<denominator>) function.
Expression:
Tokenize().Any(
    Type = DIV and
    Next.Type <> INTEGER_LITERAL and
    Next.Type <> REAL_LITERAL
)

Name: Measures must have descriptions
Description: All measures should have a description for documentation and maintainability purposes.

Name: Avoid SUMMARIZECOLUMNS in measures
Description: SUMMARIZECOLUMNS should not be used in measures as it can cause performance issues.

Name: Measures should have format strings
Description: All measures should have an appropriate format string defined.
